hints: Spend is money, not a count: the amount for each line is b.price * ol.quantity. Total that with SUM(b.price * ol.quantity).
Keep the three joins (customer -> book_order -> order_line -> book) so you can reach both the price (book) and the quantity (order_line).
Wrap the sum in ROUND(..., 2) and alias it total_spent, then ORDER BY total_spent DESC. Leo has no orders, so an inner join correctly leaves him out.
